resources.string: Your playlist has {items, plural, one {# album.} other {# albums.}}
You and followers you follow back will see each other\’s activity status when both of you have this on.
We\'ll surge impressions for your show for up to 15 minutes. If you are already live, the clock starts now, so go max your moment!
Count buyers\' Community Boost contributions toward their Rewards Club achievements.
Camera and audio permissions are required
Let\'s find you\nsomething to shop for.
👋 joined through a shared link by @%1$s
Check your connection and try again.
Are you sure you want to place a %1$s bid? Failed payments may lead to action against your account.
By continuing, you agree to our <annotation tag="termsOfService">Terms of Service</annotation> and <annotation tag="privacyPolicy">Privacy Policy</annotation>
Once you make your first purchase, %1$s will receive the same amount of credit.
%1$s invited you to Whatnot! Make your first purchase and join millions of shoppers on Whatnot.
Continue with onboarding to see other opportunities to get Whatnot credit. <annotation tag="link">See Terms</annotation>
Unfortunately you don\'t qualify for referral credit
Congratulations! You have %1$s in Whatnot credit.
Enjoy a %1$s credit to spend on your first purchase!
Enjoy %1$s - %2$s credit to spend on your first purchase!
If turned on this product will be available before and after the Flash Sale at full price.
Set a max purchase limit per buyer.
This allows us to suggest more relevant categories.
Looks like something went wrong, tap retry to try again
Looks like something went wrong. Check out our <annotation tag="status_page">status page</annotation> or tap retry to try again.
I\'m interested in selling on Whatnot!
Pick a few to get started.
What do you like to shop for?
Invalid code. Please try again or ask for a new code.
Your referral invites show up here!
Welcome to Whatnot! In order to bid on auctions you need to add a payment method and shipping address. All bids and purchases are final.
Join a live shopping community for curators and collectors.
Don\'t have an account? <annotation tag="cta">Sign Up</annotation>
Another bidder is winning. Increase your Bid.
Join a live show to purchase items, chat with sellers in real time.
Bid on items in a live show to purchase. Shop with confidence, get the item you ordered or your money back.
Bookmark an upcoming show by tapping the bookmark icon. We\'ll send you a reminder when the show starts!
Take Me to my Home Feed
Oops, something went wrong! Please try again.
Payment Failed. Update your payment method within 24 hours.
Phone number already linked to different account. Contact support.
Please set your shipping information here.
Take a look at our new and improved seller analytics design!
See the impact for yourself! Shows that leverage Promote Tools drive more impressions, clicks, and sales. Lock in your next show\'s success today!
Let\’s take your next show to new heights!
This will help us create the best shopping experience for you!
Turn this on to join shows without being announced in the chat. You\’ll still be able to bid, buy, and chat as usual.
We\'ll send you a reminder when %1$s goes live. Enable notifications to never miss a show!
Next, let\'s set up your profile and shopping preferences so we can find the best sellers and deals for you.
Congrats! You just redeemed %1$s credit from %2$s
Check out the Whatnot app. Sign up with this link and you will get %1$s off your first purchase. %2$s
Check out the Whatnot app! Sign up with my link and get up to %1$s off your first purchase. %2$s
Finish signing up in the next 24 hours and receive %1$s in Whatnot credit
Finish signing up in the next 24 hours to get up to %1$s in Whatnot credit
%1$s invited you to Whatnot! Finish signup to receive your free credit. Make your first purchase and join millions of shoppers on Whatnot.
%1$s invited you to Whatnot! Finish signup to receive your free credit. Make your first purchase and join millions of shoppers on Whatnot. <annotation tag="link">See Terms</annotation>
Congratulations! You got %1$s of Whatnot credit for referring %2$s users.
Congratulations! You got %1$s of Whatnot credit from referring %2$s.
Pick only what you\'re passionate about.
Go live and we\'ll fuel your growth with bonus cash.\n<annotation tag="link">Choose Your Bonus</annotation>
We\’re having trouble verifying your ID card. Please try again or contact support.
Your ID verification has been submitted. This should only take a moment.
Please visit the seller verification page to learn more.
This rarely takes more than an hour. We\'ll notify you when we\'re done.
It takes you 2 minutes, but it can take us up to an hour to process your verification.
Set preferred Point Relais pickup location
Check out this profile on Whatnot.com
Shipment statuses auto-update when we receive an update from the carrier, typically within a day or two.
Already shipped without using the in-app scanner?
This item is currently unavailable to ship to your location.
Could not load challenge. Please try again later.
Your account has been created, but we hit a snag setting up - please sign in.
You\'ve hit your spend limit — purchasing will resume once your limit resets.
This means when you\'re down to 00:01, the last person to bid wins!
Sorry! We\'ve encountered an error when loading this conversation. Please try again later.
You have been flagged as an under-18 seller. Sellers between the ages of 13–17 can only sell on their parent or guardians account.
By tapping sign up you agree to our <annotation tag="termsOfService">Terms of Service</annotation> and <annotation tag="privacyPolicy">Privacy Policy</annotation>
There\’s nothing here at the moment!
Turn this on if you\'d like to receive direct messages from Whatnot users.
Invalid username format. Don\'t use spaces, special characters. Max 20 characters
Cannot change username while orders are pending
You\'ve hit your watch limit — streaming will resume once your limit resets.
This weekly bundle is scheduled to ship on %1$s
Are you sure you want to generate this label? This will close the bundle early and could result in additional shipping costs for the buyer.
Sign up and join a live shopping community for curators and collectors.
Shop, sell, and connect around the things you love.
Already have an account? <annotation tag="cta">Log In</annotation>
Your sale is protected against fraudulent buyers.
You can always change this later.
